creator: vicedar@gmail.com
text:
Hi, I don't know if this the appropriate way to notify packagers of new
upstream release, but I would just like to mention that there is a new release
for surl, mainly a bugfix release - 1.7.1.1:
https://launchpad.net/surl/+announcement/9738
https://launchpad.net/surl/+announcement/9734

Also, as a note, I moved *.txt files to normal ones (AUTHORS, LICENSE):
https://bazaar.launchpad.net/~surl/surl/trunk/files

Download links:
https://launchpad.net/surl/trunk/0.7.1/+download/surl-0.7.1.1.tar.gz
https://launchpad.net/surl/trunk/0.7.1/+download/surl-0.7.1.1.tar.bz2

Thanks in advance.
